prompt: Create a realistic cinematic four-panel scene collage from a modern romantic drama, arranged as a clean 2x2 grid with thin white dividers and no captions or text. The scene takes place at night in a warm, upscale hotel or apartment lobby with dark wood floors, beige walls, framed art, stairs, table lamps, and soft amber practical lighting. Feature exactly two characters in every panel: a young blonde woman and a young man. The woman has long straight blonde hair, blue eyes, fair skin, and wears a camel blazer over a muted rust-orange blouse with white trousers; she holds a dark navy or black folder/binder against her chest in most shots, looking anxious but composed. The man is tall with fair skin, short curly light-brown hair, slight stubble, and wears a fitted black button-up shirt and dark trousers, with a serious conflicted expression. Panel 1, top left: wide full-body shot in the lobby, the woman stands on the left clutching the folder and looking up at the man, the man stands on the right in profile with one hand in his pocket, tense distance between them. Panel 2, top right: close-up over the woman’s blurred blonde shoulder, focusing on the man’s face as he looks at her with a furrowed brow, shallow depth of field. Panel 3, bottom left: close-up of the woman from the front, holding the folder to her chest, eyes glossy and vulnerable as she looks toward the man, his dark shoulder blurred in the foreground. Panel 4, bottom right: intimate medium close-up side profile of both characters facing each other very closely, the woman on the left looking up, the man on the right looking down, emotional tension and soft lamp glow behind them. Use natural skin texture, realistic photography, cinematic color grading, warm shadows, shallow depth of field, high-end TV drama stills, no watermark, no visible noise, no distorted faces, no extra people in focus. Character customization: young blonde woman in a camel blazer, rust-orange blouse, and white trousers holding a dark folder; young curly-haired man in a fitted black button-up shirt and dark trousers; warm upscale hotel lobby at night; tense romantic confrontation; 2x2 cinematic collage with thin white dividers.

promptZh: 创作一张来自现代浪漫剧集的写实电影感四格场景拼贴画，以整洁的 2x2 网格排列，带有细白分割线，无标题或文字。场景设定在夜晚，地点为温馨的高档酒店或公寓大堂，配有深色木地板、米色墙壁、装饰画、楼梯、台灯以及柔和的琥珀色实用照明。每个画面中必须包含两名角色：一名年轻的金发女性和一名年轻男性。女性留着长直金发，蓝眼睛，皮肤白皙，身穿驼色西装外套，内搭柔和的铁锈橙色衬衫，下穿白色长裤；在多数镜头中，她将一个深蓝色或黑色文件夹/活页夹抱在胸前，神情焦虑但保持镇定。男性身材高大，皮肤白皙，留着短卷浅棕色头发，略带胡茬，身穿修身黑色衬衫和深色长裤，表情严肃且充满矛盾。第 1 格（左上）：大堂内的宽幅全身镜头，女性站在左侧紧抱文件夹仰视男性，男性站在右侧呈侧面，一只手插在口袋里，两人之间保持着紧张的距离。第 2 格（右上）：越过女性模糊的金发肩膀拍摄的特写，焦点对准男性的脸部，他皱着眉头看向她，浅景深效果。第 3 格（左下）：女性的正面特写，她将文件夹抱在胸前，眼神湿润且脆弱地看向男性，男性的深色肩膀在前景中模糊处理。第 4 格（右下）：两人面对面近距离的亲密中景侧面特写，女性在左侧仰视，男性在右侧俯视，情感张力十足，背景中有柔和的灯光。使用自然的皮肤纹理、写实摄影、电影级调色、温暖的阴影、浅景深，呈现高端电视剧剧照质感，无水印，无可见噪点，无扭曲的面部，焦点内无其他无关人员。角色自定义：身穿驼色西装外套、铁锈橙色衬衫、白色长裤并手持深色文件夹的年轻金发女性；身穿修身黑色衬衫和深色长裤的年轻卷发男性；夜晚温馨的高档酒店大堂；紧张的浪漫对峙；带有细白分割线的 2x2 电影感拼贴画。
